basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Project Associate, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Project Positions Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. IITD/IRD/149/2026 on its official website https://home.iitd.ac.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 11 Project Positions on a contractual basis. Candidates holding qualifications such as Graduate Degree, B.Tech., M.Tech., M.Sc., M.C.A., Post Graduation, Ph.D., MS(R), AMIE, MD, MS, MDS, MVSc, or M.Pharm are eligible to apply. The age limit is not specified in the notification. Eligible candidates can submit their email applications up to 02 July 2026. The official not

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree, Ph.D., M. Tech., B. Tech., M. Sc., M.C.A., Post Graduation, MS(R), AMIE, MD, MS, MDS, MVSc, M.Pharm
qualification.details: Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.): Graduate Degree in Arts/Science/Commerce or Business Management. At least 8 years' experience in the actual conduct of meetings/examinations and/or adequate experience of supervisory work at Jr. Superintendent level in an educational Institution. Desirable: Knowledge of Office Procedures, rules & regulations generally operative in Educational Institutions including experience in handling work in connection with meetings & conferences. Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and office management tools. Experience in calendar management, scheduling meetings, and coordination. Principal Project Scientist: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate discipline OR M. Tech. 1st class or equivalent OR M.Sc. in science or engineering or MS(R) or equivalent (MA/MCom/MDes) with 6 years experience. Project Scientist: B. Tech. / M. Sc. /M.C.A. / Post Graduation in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Sr. Project Scientist: M. Tech. / MS(R) / MCA 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline OR B.Tech. / M. Sc. / post Graduation in relevant discipline (all first class or equivalent) with 3 years experience. Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.): B. Tech. / B.E. / AMIE and equivalent OR Technical Diploma (3 years duration) / Graduate Degree in appropriate discipline with 5 years relevant work experience. In exceptional cases ITI (2 years duration) with 11 years of work experience in relevant field may also be considered. Research Associate - II: Ph.D/MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech. with at least one research paper in Science Citation (SCI) journal. Research Associate - III: Ph.D/MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech. with at least one research paper in Science Citation (SCI) journal. Jr. Research Fellow: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science with NET qualification or Graduate Degree in Professional course with NET qualification or Post Graduate Degree in Professional course.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Positions is 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for IIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for various Project Positions at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is via Email.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for these positions at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Graduate Degree to a Ph.D. Please refer to the detailed eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the Project Positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies for each post, with details provided in the Salary section of this article. It includes a base salary and HRA.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Delhi offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. It is advisable to check the official notification for any such provisions.
